name: HR_ORGANIZATION_V
query: SELECT ou.ORGANIZATION_ID, ou.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE, ou.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE, ou.ACTION_OCCURRENCE_ID, ou.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID, ou.NAME, ou.TITLE, ou.TYPE, ou.INTERNAL_EXTERNAL_FLAG, ou.INTERNAL_ADDRESS_LINE, ou.LOCATION_ID, ou.ESTABLISHMENT_ID, ou.LEGAL_ENTITY_ID, ouc.CLASSIFICATION_CODE, ouc.LEGISLATION_CODE, ouc.STATUS STATUS, ouc.SET_ID, ou.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY, ou.ATTRIBUTE1, ou.ATTRIBUTE2, ou.ATTRIBUTE3, ou.ATTRIBUTE4, ou.ATTRIBUTE5, ou.ATTRIBUTE6, ou.ATTRIBUTE7, ou.ATTRIBUTE8, ou.ATTRIBUTE9, ou.ATTRIBUTE10, ou.ATTRIBUTE11, ou.ATTRIBUTE12, ou.ATTRIBUTE13, ou.ATTRIBUTE14, ou.ATTRIBUTE15, ou.ATTRIBUTE16, ou.ATTRIBUTE17, ou.ATTRIBUTE18, ou.ATTRIBUTE19, ou.ATTRIBUTE20, ou.ATTRIBUTE21, ou.ATTRIBUTE22, ou.ATTRIBUTE23, ou.ATTRIBUTE24, ou.ATTRIBUTE25, ou.ATTRIBUTE26, ou.ATTRIBUTE27, ou.ATTRIBUTE28, ou.ATTRIBUTE29, ou.ATTRIBUTE30, ou.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, ou.CREATED_BY, ou.CREATION_DATE, ou.LAST_UPDATED_BY, ou.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, ou.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, ou.ORGANIZATION_CODE, ou.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER1, ou.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER2, ou.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER3, ou.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER4, ou.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER5, ou.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER6, ou.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER7, ou.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER8, ou.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER9, ou.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER10, ou.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER11, ou.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER12, ou.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER13, ou.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER14, ou.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER15, ou.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER16, ou.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER17, ou.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER18, ou.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER19, ou.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER20, ou.ATTRIBUTE_DATE1, ou.ATTRIBUTE_DATE2, ou.ATTRIBUTE_DATE3, ou.ATTRIBUTE_DATE4, ou.ATTRIBUTE_DATE5, ou.ATTRIBUTE_DATE6, ou.ATTRIBUTE_DATE7, ou.ATTRIBUTE_DATE8, ou.ATTRIBUTE_DATE9, ou.ATTRIBUTE_DATE10, ou.ATTRIBUTE_DATE11, ou.ATTRIBUTE_DATE12, ou.ATTRIBUTE_DATE13, ou.ATTRIBUTE_DATE14, ou.ATTRIBUTE_DATE15 FROM HR_ALL_ORGANIZATION_UNITS_F_VL ou, HR_ORG_UNIT_CLASSIFICATIONS_F ouc WHERE ou.ORGANIZATION_ID = ouc.ORGANIZATION_ID AND ou.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE BETWEEN ouc.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE AND ouc.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE
